title: Use numeracy skills in meat processing
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Use numeracy skills in meat processing demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Use familiar basic metric measurements

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate meat scales?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate meat scales.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Tare scales?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tare scales.

pcs.text: Weigh meat and/or ingredients using grams and kilograms, to two decimal places
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Weigh meat and/or ingredients using grams and kilograms, to two decimal places?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Weigh meat and/or ingredients using grams and kilograms, to two decimal places.

pcs.text: Read temperature scales and/or gauges, to one decimal place
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read temperature scales and/or gauges, to one decimal place?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read temperature scales and/or gauges, to one decimal place.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Use familiar basic metric measurements

elements.title: Estimate weights and measures

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate weights of meat products?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate weights of meat products.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check estimations are roughly correct?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check estimations are roughly correct.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Estimate weights and measures

elements.title: Use basic calculations

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Add weights and measures?

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Subtract weights and measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Subtract weights and measures.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Divide weights and measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Divide weights and measures.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Multiply weights and measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Multiply weights and measures.

pcs.text: Carry out basic calculations in the head
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out basic calculations in the head?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out basic calculations in the head.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Use basic calculations

elements.title: Use simple everyday fractions and decimals

pcs.text: Use simple fractions when dividing meat and/or ingredient quantities

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use simple fractions when dividing meat and/or ingredient quantities.

pcs.text: Use everyday decimals when dividing or multiplying meat and/or ingredients

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use everyday decimals when dividing or multiplying meat and/or ingredients.

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
